task_completion.description: Verify the survey is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey title '2025 Employee Benefits Vote' is visible in the LimeSurvey dashboard, survey list, or survey settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that survey responses are set to be anonymized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey settings (Participant settings), the 'Anonymized responses' option is toggled to 'Yes' or 'On'.

task_completion.description: Verify that public registration is enabled for the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey settings (Participant settings), the 'Allow public registration' option is toggled to 'Yes' or 'On'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the custom token attribute.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey participants or manage attributes settings, a custom attribute named 'EmployeeID' with the description 'Employee ID Number' is visible in the attributes list.

task_completion.description: Verify the registration email subject and body are customized according to the requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email templates settings for 'Registration', the subject input field contains 'Your Voting Link - 2025 Benefits' and the email body text area contains the phrase 'Your vote is anonymous'.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey is activated and the participant table is initialized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey status shows as 'Active' (e.g., a 'Stop this survey' button is visible or a green active status indicator) and the survey participants table is initialized (e.g., a 'Survey participants' table or summary is visible).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to configure the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LimeSurvey web UI in a web browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or direct database manipulation (like SQL queries).

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely interacted with the LimeSurvey application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate screens like settings panels, save confirmation messages, or active dropdowns, rather than just a final static text file or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the required text into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text (survey title, email subject/body) is entered into the correct input fields within the LimeSurvey application interface, not just typed into a notepad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey must be titled '2025 Employee Benefits Vote'. The custom token attribute must be named 'EmployeeID'. The registration email subject must contain 'Your Voting Link' (specifically 'Your Voting Link - 2025 Benefits') and the email body must contain 'Your vote is anonymous'.
